store/sponsored-badge.label: Sponsored
admin/editor.productSummary.title: Product Summary
admin/editor.productSummary.description: Product summary showing the main product information
admin/editor.productSummary.isOneClickBu: Redirect to checkout after clicking buy
admin/editor.productSummary.buyButtonTex: Text for the custom purchase button
admin/editor.productSummaryPrice.title: Product Summary Price
admin/editor.productSummaryPrice.descrip: Component that shows product price inside the product summary
admin/editor.productSummaryImage.title: Product Summary Image
admin/editor.productSummaryImage.descrip: Component that displays the product image
admin/editor.productSummaryImage.hoverIm: This property is deprecated. Please use the criteria property instead

Hover image label search criteria (exact: finds the image that is an exact match of the name in the 'Hover image label' field | contains: finds the first image that contains the text in the 'Hover image label' field).
admin/editor.productSummaryImage.fetchpr: Let the browser decide the priority.
admin/editor.productSummaryName.title: Product Summary Name
admin/editor.skuSummaryList.title: SKU Summary List
admin/editor.skuSummaryList.description: Lists SKUs as individual cards from a product ID or a manual selection
admin/editor.skuSummaryList.productId.de: Catalog product ID whose SKUs will be listed. Ignored when SKUs are added manually below.
admin/editor.skuSummaryList.skus.title: SKUs
admin/editor.skuSummaryList.skus.descrip: Add SKUs one by one. When this list has items, the Product ID field is ignored.
Applied only when using Product ID. Ignored when SKUs are added manually.
admin/editor.skuSummaryList.maxItems.des: Limits how many SKU cards appear when using Product ID. Ignored when SKUs are added manually.
